summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.intent; public class ConfidenceEvaluator { public static double evaluate(IntentAnalysisResult result) { double score = 1.0; if (result.getGoal() == null || result.getGoal().trim().isEmpty()) { score -= 0.4; } if (!result.getMissingInformation().isEmpty()) { score -= Math.min(0.4, result.getMissingInformation().size() * 0.1); } if (!result.getAmbiguities().isEmpty()) { score -= Math.min(0.2, result.getAmbiguities().size() * 0.05); } if (!result.getContradictions().isEmpty()) { score -= Math.min(0.3, result.getContradictions().size() * 0.15); } return Math.max(0.0, Math.min(1.0, score)); } }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
